name: Mortenax Blade
desc: Body like spring wood, heart like dead ash. Yet embers of a craftsman's spark still linger at his fingertips.\nAs ancient grudges are ignited once more, he promises to send both himself and the gods to the other side...\nTorn flesh, tempered a thousand times into a blade... What answer will it create?

1.name: Ere My Death, I Stood Unmade
1.desc: While the Zone is active, decreases all enemies' All-Type RES by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. After using the extra Skill from Talent, the "Infinite Fury" countdown has its <u>action delayed</u> by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>.

10000002.name: Delay Action
10000002.desc: Increases the target's waiting interval before the next action.

2.name: Ash Was My Heart, Yet the Flame Stayed
2.desc: When an ally character uses Ultimate to deal DMG, it is considered as having launched <u>Follow-Up ATK</u>. And the <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> DMG dealt by ally targets increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. The upper limit of Mortenax Blade's Charge decreases to <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>.

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

3.name: Across the Shore, Wrath Laid Bare
3.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

4.name: Odium I've Smitten, Thence Came the Blade
4.desc: "Heart, Refined ad Infinitum" additionally increases ally targets' DMG dealt by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

5.name: I Severed My Woes, Knowing Death Begets Life
5.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

6.name: If Immortality Could Die, I Swore THEM Slain
6.desc: As the Zone persists, when Mortenax Blade takes DMG or consumes HP, he gains 1 Charge. This effect can trigger again after any target's turn ends. The DMG multiplier of "Tenax Per Ignem" increases to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of its original value.

150701.name: A Broken Blade Still Slays
150701.desc: Deals Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Mortenax Blade's Max HP to one designated enemy, and causes the target to enter the Taunt state for 1 turn.
150701.simple_desc: Deals minor Fire DMG to one enemy and inflicts the Taunt state on the target.

150702.name: A Rain of Blades Seals Fate
150702.desc:
Consumes HP equal to <unbreak>#4[f1]%</unbreak> of Mortenax Blade's Max HP and deals Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Mortenax Blade's Max HP to all enemies, and additionally deals <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> instance(s) of DMG, with each instance dealing Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Mortenax Blade's Max HP to one random enemy.
If the current HP is insufficient, Mortenax Blade's current HP will be reduced to 1 when he uses Skill.
While not in the "Infinite Fury" state or when the current HP is 1 or lower, Mortenax Blade cannot use his Skill.
Using Skill does not consume Skill Points.
150702.simple_desc: Consumes HP and deals Fire DMG to all enemies. Then, deals minor Fire DMG to single enemies, bouncing <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> time(s).

150703.name: Fornax Ex Corpore
150703.desc:
Inflicts "Balefire Bind" on all enemies. Enemy targets in the "Balefire Bind" state have their DEF reduced by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#7[f1]%</unbreak></color> and the DMG they receive increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[f1]%</unbreak></color>, lasting for <unbreak>#8[i]</unbreak> turn(s). Then, consumes HP equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of Mortenax Blade's Max HP to deploy a Zone. While the Zone is active, Mortenax Blade enters the "Infinite Fury" state.
During the "Infinite Fury" state, increases CRIT Rate by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>, increases CRIT DMG by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[f1]%</unbreak></color>, enhances Basic ATK, unlocks Skill, and gains a new Ultimate "Tenax Per Ignem." When receiving a killing blow, this unit will not be <u>knocked down</u>, but will dispel the Zone, exit the "Infinite Fury" state, and restore HP equal to <unbreak>#6[i]%</unbreak> of this unit's Max HP.
When gaining the "Infinite Fury" state, a corresponding countdown appears on the Action Order. The countdown has a fixed SPD of <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak>. At the start of the countdown's turn, dispels the Zone and exits the "Infinite Fury" state.
If the current HP is insufficient, Mortenax Blade's current HP will be reduced to 1 when he uses this ability.
150703.simple_desc: Inflicts "Balefire Bind" on all enemies, causing the targets to <color=#f29e38ff>decrease their DEF and increase the DMG they receive</color>. Then, consumes this unit's HP to activate a Zone. While the Zone is active, this unit gains the "Infinite Fury" state, increases CRIT Rate, increases CRIT DMG, enhances Basic ATK, unlocks Skill, and gains a <color=#f29e38ff>new Ultimate</color>, lasting until the countdown ends.\nWhen Mortenax Blade receives a killing blow, the Zone is dispelled.

10000007.name: Downed State
10000007.desc: An ally will be incapacitated once their HP is reduced to 0.

150704.name: All Karma Comes Due
150704.desc: While the Zone is active, after each attack an ally target uses on an enemy, inflicts the "Balefire Bind" state on the corresponding enemy target and grants 1 Charge to Mortenax Blade. When Charge reaches <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> points and the current HP is more than 1, consumes <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Charge, regenerates <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[f1]</unbreak></color> Energy, and enables Mortenax Blade to use Skill 1 extra time. This extra Skill use is considered as <u>Follow-Up ATK</u>.
150704.simple_desc: While the Zone is active, after an ally target attacks an enemy, inflicts the "Balefire Bind" state on the enemy and grants Charge to Mortenax Blade. When Charge reaches <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> points and his HP is higher than 1, consumes <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> Charge to regenerate Energy, and enables Mortenax Blade to use his <color=#f29e38ff>Skill</color> 1 <color=#f29e38ff>extra time</color>.

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

150706.name: One Cut Ends All
150706.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

150707.name: Blade's Reach Spares None
150707.desc: Immediately attacks all enemies within a certain range. After entering combat, inflicts the Taunt state on all enemies for 1 turn and decreases DMG taken by this unit by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
150707.simple_desc: Attacks all enemies within range. After entering combat, inflicts the Taunt state on all enemies and reduces DMG taken by this unit.

150708.name: A Tempered Blade Severs Souls
150708.desc: Deals Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Mortenax Blade's Max HP to one designated enemy, and causes the target to enter the Taunt state for 1 turn.
150708.simple_desc: Deals Fire DMG to one enemy and inflicts the Taunt state on the target.

150709.name: A Rain of Blades Seals Fate

150714.name: Tenax Per Ignem
150714.desc: Deals Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Mortenax Blade's Max HP to all enemies.
150714.simple_desc: Deals massive Fire DMG to all enemies.

1.point_desc: Mortenax Blade can accumulate up to <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> overflow Energy. After using Ultimate, clears it and regenerates a corresponding amount of Energy. When the battle starts or when the Zone is dispelled, if Energy is below <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>, it is immediately regenerated to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. When Energy is regenerated to its maximum, dispels all <u>debuffs</u> from this unit.

10000010.name: Debuff
10000010.desc: All status effects that provide negative combat debuffs, can be dispelled unless stated otherwise.

1.point_desc: While the Zone is active, increases the chance of being attacked by enemies, decreases DMG taken by this unit by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>, and increases Incoming Healing by <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>. After being attacked, inflicts the "Balefire Bind" state on the corresponding target, and enables Mortenax Blade to gain 1 Charge.

While the Zone is active, ally targets deal <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> increased DMG. If there are other Nihility characters aside from Mortenax Blade in the team, Ultimate DMG dealt by ally targets increases by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>. Otherwise, DMG dealt by Mortenax Blade additionally increases by <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>.
